goal: Add an external CUDA operator transfer/readiness manifest builder so operators can verify full-checkout handoff requirements before running the CUDA training launcher, without claiming release GO.
head: a61cbd3
docs_root_resolution: User requested current repo docs; /home/firewine/getbeta/docs protocol copy is reference-only for this checkout.
blocked_scope: Changing product runtime code, API behavior, frontend behavior, DB schema, model catalog, examples, schemas, release readiness acceptance criteria, or no-fake endpoint checks
Generating, inventing, copying, or promoting real adapter, endpoint, benchmark, package, export, release, or external evidence into the repository
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO
Committing model weights, strict model cache files, adapter artifacts, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied evidence bundles, generated venv content, or Docker layers
Regenerating external CUDA operator packet artifacts in this tooling phase
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: Add transfer/readiness manifest tooling and tests only; leave packet artifacts stale until the follow-up packet refresh phase.
required_evidence: PABCD contract is valid JSON and includes mode=development plus phase notes for plan, audit, build, check, and done.

New transfer manifest builder emits READY_EXTERNAL_CUDA_OPERATOR_TRANSFER only when packet verification is GO, warnings are empty, no release GO is claimed, and packet/verification source commits match.
Manifest instructs operators to use a full repository checkout, not a partial tar of selected files.
Packet builder and verifier recognize the transfer manifest builder as a required committed handoff support file.
Focused tests cover ready manifest generation, NOT_GO verification rejection, warning rejection, and no-GO claims.
No product runtime code, release criteria, M6 review docs, packet artifacts, model cache files, real adapter evidence, Docker artifacts, or evidence bundles are staged.

covered: packet builder includes transfer manifest builder as required committed file
packet verifier requires transfer manifest builder path

follow_up.reason: packet builder/verifier required-file contract now includes scripts/build_external_cuda_operator_transfer_manifest.py

warnings: This phase intentionally makes the existing packet artifact stale because the packet required-file set changes.
A follow-up packet refresh phase must regenerate external_cuda_operator_packet at the commit created by this phase.
M6-RC and v0 release remain NOT_GO until accepted real trained CUDA lora_adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence exists.

phase_notes.plan: Add transfer/readiness manifest tooling for the external CUDA operator path and include that tooling in the packet required-file set.
phase_notes.audit: Current packet is GO at source commit 7e6c545, but it does not describe a full-checkout transfer manifest builder; final release remains blocked by real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint.
phase_notes.build: Implement the transfer manifest builder, update packet builder/verifier required-file metadata, add focused tests, and update LLM operational docs.
phase_notes.check: Run focused tests, py_compile, live manifest generation to /tmp, JSON validation, evidence grep, status/scope checks, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, mark complete, stage only allowed files, commit, push, and leave release GO claims false.

pabcd.approved_scope: Add transfer/readiness manifest tooling and tests for the external CUDA operator path.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product/runtime/schema/foundation/M6 review/evidence-policy changes; no release GO claim; no generated model cache, adapter, Docker, endpoint, evidence bundle, packet artifact, or venv artifacts.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this phase.
